steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The sentence begins with the modifier Home to roughly 710,000 people. That modifier must describe the subject that immediately follows it, so the subject needs to be a place that can literally be home to people.

steps.title: Choose the logical subject
steps.content: Choice B lacks a workable main clause. Choices C and D make a percentage the subject, but a percentage cannot be home to people. The sentence works only when the subject is the city of Riga, a place the opening modifier can describe. The answer is A.
